prompt: I need to start my Rails server in the background so I can keep working on code. It takes about 10 seconds to boot and prints 'Listening on http://0.0.0.0:3000' when ready. After it's up I want to run the integration test suite against it, and then shut everything down.

assertions.description: Uses agent-procs run to start the server, not nohup or &
Uses --name flag to name the server process
Uses agent-procs wait with --until to detect readiness
Wait command includes --timeout with a reasonable value (>= 10s)
Integration tests execute after the wait command
Uses agent-procs stop (or stop-all) to shut down after tests
